title: Balochistan Sales Tax on Services (BSTS) Act MCQs
description: Multiple choice questions covering sections 1 to 100 of the BSTS Act, including definitions, tax liability, registration, appeals, penalties, and schedules.

questions.text: Under Section 1(2), to which area does the Act extend?

options: Trade, commerce, or manufacture of a non-governmental nature
Provision of services by a club or association to its members
Services of an individual provided as an employee to their employer under a written contract
Services delivered through digital, electronic, or virtual means
Activities carried on occasionally without pecuniary profit
